title: Tern - no charge case screens (Onboarding, Tutorial screen)
scenario: Smart charge case screens missing during Onboarding when starting Tutorial with Voyager Free 60+ attached in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure a Voyager Free 60+ (Tern) headset is connected to the device via Bluetooth.
3. On the Home screen, locate and tap the Tutorial option to open the Tutorial screen.
4. On the Tutorial screen, tap the Start Onboarding button to begin the onboarding process.
5. Observe the screens displayed during the onboarding flow.
expected: Smart charge case screens should appear during the onboarding flow, showing relevant information about the charging case.
